installCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b 3.22.0 && export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && flutter doctor
buildCommand: export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && flutter build web --web-renderer html --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
